options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: levelsanity
options.description:
Makes level-ups location checks. 
This adds between 1-29 checks depending on on the LevelSanity Range option below.

options.name: levelsanity_range
options.description: How many level-ups are included as location checks. Levels after 10 have the magic key in logic to prevent a tedious early grind.

options.name: searchsanity
options.description:
Adds search spot items as location checks.
This adds 3 checks.

options.name: shopsanity
options.description:
Buying a piece of equipment sends a location check instead of buying it. Adds progressive equipment items instead.
This adds 13 checks. This option overrides and disables the randomized equipment shops option below.

options.name: monstersanity
options.description:
Killing a monster for the first time sends a location check. This adds 40 checks. This option overrides and disables
the random monster zones option below.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: random_growth
options.description: Player statistical growth at each level will be randomized.

options.name: random_map
options.description:
The overworld map will be randomly generated. Stairs leading to other maps (Tantegel Basement, Garin's Grave) 
are also shuffled.

Note that this is currently an experimental option! If you roll an unwinnable seed please let the developer know.

options.name: random_map_size
options.description: Sets the size of the randomly generated map.

options.name: random_spell_learning
options.description: The order and level you learn spells will be random.

options.name: random_weapon_shops
options.description:
The weapons available in each shop will be randomized.

Overriden and disabled by Shopsanity option above.

options.name: random_weapon_prices
options.description: The prices of weapons in shops will be randomized.

options.name: heal_hurt_before_more
options.description: HEAL must come before HEALMORE; HURT before HURTMORE. This option only does something if you have Random Spell Learning on

options.name: random_xp_requirements
options.description: Experience requirements for each level will be randomized

options.name: random_monster_abilities
options.description: Monster spells and abilities will be randomized

options.name: random_monster_zones
options.description: Monster encounters in each zone will be randomized

options.name: random_monster_stats
options.description: Monster strength, agility, and HP will be randomized

options.name: random_monster_xp
options.description: The XP and GOLD gained from monsters will be randomized

options.name: make_random_stats_consistent
options.description: This makes the random stats, XP, and GOLD consistent with one another

options.name: scared_metal_slimes
options.description: Metal Slimes will always have a chance to run

options.name: scaled_metal_slime_xp
options.description: Metal Slime XP will depend on your current level

options.name: no_hurtmore
options.description: You will never learn HURTMORE. Monsters can still have it. This only works with Randomized Spells on

options.name: only_healmore
options.description: Never learn any spell other than this. This only works with Randomized Spells on

options.name: no_numbers
options.description: No numbers will be visible until the Dragonlord fight

options.name: invisible_hero
options.description: Your sprite will be invisible

options.name: invisible_npcs
options.description: All NPCs will be invisible

options.name: bonk_damage
options.description: Bonking into walls will deal damage!

options.name: enable_menu_wrapping
options.description: This enables cursor wrapping in menus

options.name: enable_death_necklace
options.description: Equipping the death necklace will give +10AP and -25% HP

options.name: enable_battle_torches
options.description: Torches and Fairy water can be thrown at monsters

options.name: repel_in_dungeons
options.description: Enables REPEL to work in dungeons

options.name: permanent_repel
options.description: REPEL will always be active

options.name: permanent_torch
options.description: At least a 3x3 area will always be lit in dungeons

options.name: fast_text
options.description: All text will progress much faster

options.name: speed_hacks
options.description: Various aspects of the game will be much faster

options.name: summer_sale
options.description: All weapons and armor 35-65% off!

options.name: levelling_speed
options.description: Determines how fast you level up

options.name: level_1_radiant
options.description: If spells are randomized, makes sure the hero always knows Radiant. Overrides 'Only Healmore'

options.name: level_1_repel
options.description: If spells are randomized, makes sure the hero always knows Repel. Overrides 'Only Healmore'

options.name: easy_charlock
options.description: Make it slightly easier to run from high level monsters

options.name: modern_spell_names
options.description: Use spell names from more recent DQ releases

options.name: skip_original_credits
options.description: Skip the original credits and go straight to stat scroll

options.name: return_escapes
options.description: Return can be used in battle for a guaranteed escape

options.name: return_to_town
options.description: Wings and Return send you to the last place you saved or used an inn at

options.name: warp_whistle
options.description: The Fairy Flute will work as a warp whistle outside of battle, cycling between places you saved or used an inn at

options.name: levelup_refill
options.description: Have HP and MP refilled afater levelling up

options.name: ascetic_king
options.description: King Lorik will let the player keep their hard-earned gold upon dying.

options.name: run_mechanics
options.description:
Change how a successful run is determined.

DW 1: Vanilla run mechanics
Safer DW 1: Vanilla run mechanics, 4th run attempt guaranteed
DW 2: 2/3 chance to run away at every attempt
DW 4: 1st attempt: 50%, 2nd attempt: 50%, 3rd attempt: 75%, 4th attempt, 100%

options.name: charlock_inn
options.description: Make the final dive easier by having a comfy bed and breakfast at the Dragonlord's

options.name: dl1_crits
options.description: Allow excellent moves against the Dragonlord's 1st form

options.name: dl2_crits
options.description: Allow excellent moves against the Dragonlord's 2nd form

options.name: shuffle_music
options.description: Music in each area will be randomized

options.name: disable_music
options.description: This disables the game music in most situations

options.name: show_death_counter
options.description: The stats window will also have a death counter

options.name: disable_spell_flashing
options.description: Prevents the screen from flashing when you cast spells

options.name: disable_red_flashes
options.description: Prevents the screen from flashing when walking on damage tiles

options.name: noir_mode
options.description: It's all black and white baby!

options.name: magic_herbs
options.description: Make herbs refill MP rather than HP

options.name: normal_flute_speed
options.description: If Speed Hacks is on, the Fairy Flute music will not be sped up

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
